questionHtml: Given that Argentina won the previous match, show that Helen’s estimate for the probability of Argentina winning the next match is 1729.
markschemeHtml:
there are 145 transitions that start with Argentina,                          (M1)

(of which 85 lead to Argentina winning,) so the probability is 85145                          A1

=1729                          AG

 

[2 marks]
